unit.note: Full vitest suites re-run after the 1039 additive `// @covers` comment insertions. server: 192 files, 2245 passed + 1 skipped. client: 295 files, 2695 passed. 0 failures; tsc --noEmit clean for both workspaces. Tags are comments (behavior-neutral) — counts match the pre-change baseline.

integration.note: webui vitest does not separate an integration layer; covered within the unit suites.

e2e.note: No product UI/API surface changed (data/tags + docs). The end-to-end verification for THIS change is the traceability pipeline itself: config -> test_links collector -> test-traceability.json (1038 bindings, was 0 without the config) -> strict D-orphan detector (live proof: MEDIUM on an absent-FR tag, pass after revert). Captured in .shipwright/compliance/test-traceability-coverage-delta.md.

smoke.note: No server/app started; data/tags + docs change has no smoke surface.

surface_verification.justification: Data/tags + docs only; product source (server/src, client/src app code) is byte-stable and no product UI/API/store/SSE surface changed. The real end-to-end proof is the traceability pipeline executed live: the manifest round-trip (collector bound 1038 tests WITH the config, 0 without) and the strict D-orphan detector firing MEDIUM on a synthetic absent-FR tag then passing after revert. Both captured in .shipwright/compliance/test-traceability-coverage-delta.md.

test_completeness.enumeration_basis: Behaviours this diff introduces: (1) the traceability config makes the collector scan webui's roots; (2-4) each of the three signals (unique_commit, co-location, self-listing) attributes tests to the correct FR; (5) the manifest binds tags with a layer-aware RTM; (6) strict D-orphan fires on a tag -> absent FR; (7) tags are behaviour-neutral and product source is byte-stable; (8) the signal-e discovery logic produces only correct tags. 8 behaviours; all tested; 0 untested-testable.

behaviors.behavior: traceability.test_roots makes the test_links collector scan webui's non-conventional roots
behaviors.evidence: manifest regen bound 1038 tests WITH the config block; 0 without it (the collector defaults to conventional root dirs webui lacks) — round-trip probe

behaviors.behavior: unique_commit tags (47) attribute to the correct FR
behaviors.evidence: all 47 -> FR-01.30 ('Triage Tab + Promote bridge'); introducing commit 290263e9 feat(triage); spot-check 0 wrong

behaviors.behavior: co-location tags (972) attribute to the correct FR
behaviors.evidence: 972/972 passed 3 hard gates (exclusive-owner + source-exists + import-verified); 8-FR spot-check (FR-01.35 SmartViewer, FR-01.44 terminal, FR-01.65 command palette, FR-01.64 motion, ...) all correct

behaviors.behavior: self-listing tags (20) attribute to the correct FR
behaviors.evidence: exclusive spec-listing of the test file; raised e2e-layer coverage 2 -> 8; spot-check reduced-motion-final-state.spec.ts -> FR-01.64

behaviors.behavior: the manifest binds the tags with a layer-aware RTM
behaviors.evidence: test-traceability.json schema v2: 1038 bindings, 40/66 FRs, by-layer unit 1030 / e2e 8; total reconciles to 47+972+20-1 enumeration delta

behaviors.behavior: strict D-orphan fires on a tag pointing at a removed/absent FR
behaviors.evidence: live proof on webui: synthetic @covers FR-01.99 -> D-orphan status=fail severity=MEDIUM (fr_absent); after deleting the temp file -> status=pass, orphans=0

behaviors.behavior: tags are behaviour-neutral and product source is byte-stable
behaviors.evidence: git diff origin/main touches only *.test/*.spec + config + .shipwright/*; tsc --noEmit clean (both workspaces); full suite 4940 passed / 0 failed (same counts as baseline)

behaviors.behavior: the signal-e discovery logic produces only correct tags (no wrong/fabricated attribution)
behaviors.evidence: every one of the 992 signal-e outputs is gated (exclusive-owner + exists + import) and the written total reconciles exactly to the manifest binding count; independent code-review over the prototype + a sample of tagged files

degraded.detail: The shared backfill writer prunes any '.worktrees/' path (ancestor path.parts match), so the mandated iterate worktree was relocated to C:/01_Development/wt-traceability-retrofit to run the tag writer. Pointer in .shipwright/iterate_active/ records the relocation. Framework follow-on filed (prune by descent).
